figures.caption: Figure 2: Overall pipeline of our risk-gated knowledge-aware SFT (PRISM). Starting from instruction–response pairs, we extract atomic facts and fact relations, derive token-level fact spans and risk weights, and inject these signals into SFT via a model-aware, risk-gated probability reallocation objective.

Table 1: Main results. Factual Avg is the mean of (HHEM, PopQA, TriviaQA); Common Avg is the mean of (MMLU, GSM8K, HumanEval, IFEval). Best and second-best averages within each backbone are bold and underlined, respectively.
Table 4: Summary statistics of the fact-aware preprocessing applied to lmsys chat 1m clean.
